title: Smoking-related respiratory review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Supports cough duration and character, sputum, smoking, medicines, occupation and environment, wheeze, rhinitis, heartburn, functional and mood impact, and face-to-face upper-airway, ear and chest examination.
examination.rationale: Supports tobacco exposure in adult chronic-cough history for smoking-related respiratory review; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports cough duration and character, sputum, smoking, medicines, occupation and environment, wheeze, rhinitis, heartburn, functional and mood impact, and face-to-face upper-airway, ear and chest examination.

source.title: British Thoracic Society Clinical Statement on chronic cough in adults

referral.text: Supports at least annual review of smoking, breathlessness, exercise tolerance, exacerbations, pulmonary rehabilitation, complications, medicine effects, inhaler technique, referral need, FEV1 and FVC, BMI, MRC dyspnoea, oxygen saturation, cor pulmonale, nutrition, mood, and social needs.
referral.rationale: Supports smoking and structured COPD follow-up context for smoking-related respiratory review; no decision is generated.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports at least annual review of smoking, breathlessness, exercise tolerance, exacerbations, pulmonary rehabilitation, complications, medicine effects, inhaler technique, referral need, FEV1 and FVC, BMI, MRC dyspnoea, oxygen saturation, cor pulmonale, nutrition, mood, and social needs.

source.title: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease in over 16s: diagnosis and management

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.2.137–1.2.140 and Table 6 — follow-up and review

follow_up.text: Specifies cough duration, quality, timing, risk factors, and associated-symptom history domains.
follow_up.rationale: Supports smoking context in cough assessment for smoking-related respiratory review; no decision is generated.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Specifies cough duration, quality, timing, risk factors, and associated-symptom history domains.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Product, amount, duration, pack-years, current status, dependence, respiratory symptoms, function, examination, tests, diagnosis, cessation decision and plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for smoking-related respiratory review.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
